name: Gold Line Proposal
tagline: Charcoal project proposal with thin gold geometry, boxed title frames, angular overlays, and premium dark layouts.

palette.description: charcoal canvas with thin gold line geometry, warm cream text, and muted executive neutrals

typography.style: condensed modern proposal display with neutral executive body

best_for: Premium project proposals, executive concept decks, procurement presentations, and service pitches where seriousness matters.
avoid_for: Playful campaigns, medical explainers, classroom materials, or casual portfolio decks.

source_inspiration.name: Slidesgo Custal Project Proposal
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
